svg.title: EAS Station Security & Authentication Architecture
svg.desc: Multi-layer security pipeline: IP filtering, rate limiting, password auth, MFA (TOTP), session management, RBAC permission checks, and comprehensive audit logging.
svg.text: IP Filter → Rate Limiter → Password Auth → MFA (TOTP) → Session → RBAC → Audit Log

g.text: HTTPS via nginx / Let's Encrypt TLS
user_id stored; cleared on logout / expiry
Roles stored in PostgreSQL · many-to-many with permissions · checked per request via session user_id
local_authority restricted to assigned FIPS codes and authorised event types
Captures: timestamp · user_id · username · action · resource · IP address · user agent · success/fail · details JSON
90-day retention · indexed by (user_id, action) and (timestamp, action)
